title: Record hard84 abs100k and 200-char tool previews
prompt: Create reports/hard84-abs100k-preview200.md with sections for Hard 84, Abs 100k, Preview 200, and Evidence path.

fixtureActions.content:
# Hard84 Abs100k Preview200 Contract

## Hard 84
hard compaction block ratio defaults to 0.84 so long sessions reclaim earlier while leaving summary headroom

## Abs 100k
absolute compaction trigger defaults to 100k tokens on large-context models

## Preview 200
tool-result previews default to 200 chars under the 8k budget for denser context

## Evidence path
LioraBench holdout + strategy vitest + tips ladder
